message:
test(fj-conformance): add comprehensive oracle tests for Asin primitive

Adds 23 tests for arc sine covering domain boundaries (-1 to 1),
common angles (π/6, π/4, π/3), out-of-domain (NaN), infinity, range
verification [-π/2,π/2], odd function, monotonicity, and sin/acos relationships.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
